name: Rotting Oranges
description: Given an m x n grid where 0 = empty, 1 = fresh orange, 2 = rotten orange. Every minute, any fresh orange adjacent (4-directionally) to a rotten orange becomes rotten. Return the minimum number of minutes until no fresh orange remains. If impossible, return -1.
constraints: m == grid.length. n == grid[i].length. 1 <= m, n <= 10. grid[i][j] is 0, 1, or 2.
